center.name: 烏魯班巴河
center.summary: 烏魯班巴河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括须蜂鸟、Rufous-fronted antthrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in the drainages of the Madre de Dios, Jurua, and Urubamba rivers

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The "eastern" nominate subspecies of bearded mountaineer is found in the departments of Apurímac and Cuzco of south-central Peru, in the drainages of the Urubamba and upper Apurímac rivers
